claim: the reserve mass held for an as-yet-unseen atom, read off the same fixed Born step, predicts next-unit newcomer arrival strictly better when it is the γ-decayed recent newcomer rate (floored by the reading's own long-run rate) than when it is the constant 1.0 — and the win comes from CLUSTERED novelty, ties on memoryless novelty, and matches the constant on monotone decline.
mechanism: R_t = γ·R_{t-1} + newcomers_t (fast, reactive); floor = (cumNewcomers/cumSteps)·decayedSteps (slow, the reading's own long-run newcomer mass); reserve = max(fast, floor); p(unseen) = reserve/(Σmass+reserve). Context enters at the amplitude; the normalization is unchanged. No constant, no +1 pseudo-count. Absolute continuity holds because the opening deposits ≥1 newcomer.
layer: interior (src/core/surprise.js createNoveltyReserve; threaded into src/perceiver/reading.js under opts.signalReserve, default constant = byte-identical parity)

scope.holds: clustered/open-vocabulary streams: synthetic clustered (both senses, Δ logloss +0.019), real Metamorphosis short (+0.177) and full 743-sentence (+0.362). Aggregate over real material Δ=+0.50, worst per-stream regression 0.018.
scope.fails: closed-vocabulary tails (P-0002): short nursery tunes that introduce their pitches early then only repeat tie or regress negligibly (−0.008..−0.010) because the floor expects a recurrence that has stopped. The boundary is stream statistics, not sense — a closed-vocab TEXT ties too, an open-vocab MUSIC stream wins too.

ablation: the naive single-timescale reserve (no floor) collapses at the stretch→burst transition (per-regime trace: Δ=−2.555 on stretch-start) and loses to the constant on the random-repeat clustered stimulus; the floor flips it. The floor's direct purpose (holding the reserve up after a long stretch) is locked.
gate: omnimodal — both senses improve on the matched controlled battery; interior provably modality-blind (relabel-invariant).

claim: on a stream whose vocabulary closes (all types introduced early, then pure repetition), the signal-derived reserve should match the constant, not regress.
mechanism: the long-run floor (cumNewcomers/cumSteps) stays elevated by the early introduction burst even after newcomers stop, so the reserve predicts a recurrence that does not come — a small cost (−0.008..−0.018) on short closed-vocab streams. A principled fix would estimate p(new TYPE) (Good–Turing / Pitman–Yor under γ-forgetting) so the floor relaxes when the vocabulary is exhausted, without a constant.
note: the cost is negligible (< the 0.05 break threshold) and the aggregate strongly improves, so L-001 ships; this is the next pressure to climb.
